title: draconia campestris subsp. maritima
intro: Draconia campestris subsp. maritima, also known as the sea dragonroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various medicinal effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting against oxidative stress, and potentially helping to manage diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
